negative_memory.next_boundary: C0061 R0001 shows the tested adverse excursion recovery surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0061 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0062 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -96.16, and worst fold rw_001 net PnL -17.13.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 28.98 total net PnL across 9 better and 0 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0061 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or adverse-excursion-recovery feature nudge tuning
